title: this $2k wagon can beat a porsche, and fits a piano
shortDescription: what other car has 260 horsepower, room for 5 and all their stuff, but also feels special? this ain't no 330d. filmed in south wales
story:
There's a particular quality of light at six in the morning in October. It doesn't belong to any colour — it's more of an absence of warmth that makes everything look like it was printed on newsprint. That's when we met the Saab.

The 95 was never a car that demanded attention. It earned it slowly, with the kind of understated integrity that you only notice once you've spent time with it. The boxy silhouette, the wrap-around windscreen, the way the boot lid angles back like a paperback novel left face-down on a table.

We drove it for three hours before we filmed anything. You need to know a car before you can show it honestly.
